---
title: "Teaching"
description: "Courses, syllabi, lecture materials, and teaching resources."

listing:
  contents:
    - "courses/*.qmd"
  template: course-listing.ejs.md
  sort: "order asc"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  categories: false
  page-size: 20
  feed: false
---

I teach courses in economics, probability, statistics, and data analysis.
